hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.lock|secrets\.yaml|credentials)'; then echo "拦截：禁止修改受保护文件: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+commit'; then "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/hooks/pre-commit.sh" || exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(rm\s+-rf\s+/\s*$|rm\s+-rf\s+/\*|sudo\s+rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE)'; then echo "拦截：检测到危险命令" >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(ls|head|tail|wc|grep|rg|mdls|git\s+(status|log|diff|show)|pwd|which)\b'; then echo '{"permissionDecision": "allow"}'; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && { [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/package.json" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; }
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(npm\s+run\s+tauri\s+build|^tauri\s+build)'; then "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/hooks/post-build.sh"; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude 需要你关注" with title "Claude Code"'
